rule_metadata.name: PivotalToken
rule_metadata.author: Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)
rule_metadata.description: PivotalTracker token (Created as part of PasteHunter)

rules.rule_text:
rule PivotalToken
{
	meta:
		author = "Dylan Katz (@Plazmaz)"
		description = "PivotalTracker token (Created as part of PasteHunter)"
		reference = "https://github.com/techgaun/github-dorks"
		date = "09/15/19"

	strings:
		$ = "PT_TOKEN"

	condition:
		any of them
}
